enrichments_applied: pep_normalized flag derived from kyc_profiles.pep column
mcc_risk_bucket derived from transactions.mcc and merchants.mcc_risk
cross_border_flag derived from transactions.sender_country and transactions.receiver_country

transaction_features.name: amount_brl
transaction_features.definition: Monetary amount in BRL for the transaction

transaction_features.name: rail_channel_status
transaction_features.definition: Concatenation of rail/payment channel and status of the transaction

transaction_features.name: income_ratio
transaction_features.definition: Ratio of transaction amount (amount_brl) to monthly income (annual_income_brl / 12) of the sender

transaction_features.name: velocity_count_30m
transaction_features.definition: Count of transactions by the sender in the last 30 minutes from the current transaction timestamp

transaction_features.name: structuring_7d_count
transaction_features.definition: Count of transactions by sender in last 7 days with amount_brl between 9500 and 10000 (indicative of structuring)

transaction_features.name: distinct_counterparties_7d
transaction_features.definition: Count of distinct receiver_id counterparties transacted with in the last 7 days

transaction_features.name: ecommerce_no_3ds_flag
transaction_features.definition: Flag indicating if ecommerce transaction without 3DS authentication was attempted

transaction_features.name: pep_normalized
transaction_features.definition: Normalized flag indicating if sender or receiver is a Politically Exposed Person (PEP) based on KYC data

transaction_features.name: mcc_risk_bucket
transaction_features.definition: Categorical risk bucket code derived from the MCC code risk level for the transaction merchant

transaction_features.name: cross_border_flag
transaction_features.definition: Flag indicating cross-border transaction where sender and receiver countries differ or IP country mismatch

customer.name: tx_count_7d
customer.definition: Total number of transactions by customer in last 7 days

customer.name: tx_sum_7d
customer.definition: Sum of amount_brl of transactions by customer in last 7 days

customer.name: distinct_merchants_7d
customer.definition: Count of distinct merchants the customer transacted within last 7 days

customer.name: distinct_devices_7d
customer.definition: Count of distinct device_fingerprint used by customer in last 7 days

merchant.name: tx_count_7d
merchant.definition: Total number of transactions for the merchant in last 7 days

merchant.name: distinct_customers_7d
merchant.definition: Count of distinct customers transacting with merchant in last 7 days

merchant.name: chargeback_rate
merchant.definition: Ratio of merchant chargebacks in last 90 days to total transactions (merchant_chargeback_ratio_90d)

device.name: distinct_customers_7d
device.definition: Count of distinct customers using the device in last 7 days

ip.name: distinct_customers_7d
ip.definition: Count of distinct customers from the IP address in last 7 days

warnings: High null rate in transactions.auth_3ds, eci, and pix_flow may affect ecommerce_no_3ds_flag coverage
High null rate in ip_proxy_vpn_tor column; ip entity features coverage limited
merchant.owner_customer_id has 65.1% nulls, no owner fallback applied
assumptions: Referential integrity maintained for sender_id and receiver_id between tables
Income from kyc_profiles relates to sender for income_ratio
Device reuse and IP reuse feature derivation skipped due to absence of detailed usage events
Cross-border flag uses available country fields for sender, receiver and IP
